title: Initialize Go module and basic project structure
description: Run `go mod init github.com/yourusername/sqlforge`, create standard directories (cmd, internal, examples, pkg), and add .gitignore + LICENSE (Apache 2.0).
acceptance_criteria: Directory structure matches the planned layout (cmd/sqlforge, internal/parser, etc.)

title: Add Cobra CLI framework and root command
description: Add github.com/spf13/cobra dependency and create a basic root command with version and help text.

title: Add Makefile with build targets
description: Create Makefile with wasm, build, cli, clean targets.
acceptance_criteria: Targets: wasm, build, cli, clean, test

title: Embed Polyglot WASM file placeholder
description: Add internal/parser/polyglot.wasm placeholder and go:embed in parser.go.
acceptance_criteria: File exists (even if empty for now)

title: Implement basic Polyglot WASM loader with wazero
description: Create internal/parser/parser.go with NewParser() using wazero and WASI.

title: Add transpile function to Polyglot parser
description: Implement Transpile(sql, fromDialect, toDialect) that calls the WASM module.
acceptance_criteria: transpile command works for simple SELECT

title: Add parse to AST function
description: Implement ParseToAST that returns JSON AST from Polyglot.
acceptance_criteria: ParseToAST returns valid JSON for valid SQL

title: Create model/asset.go with basic struct
description: Define Asset struct with Name, SQL, Config map, Materialized, Grain, etc.

title: Implement model loader for SQL files with @ comments
description: Parse -- @key: value comments from .sql files.

title: Implement model reference resolution via structural table name lookup (fully clean, no {{ ref() }})
description: Resolve table names like 'stg_events' to model files using project structure + Polyglot AST table extraction. No templating.
acceptance_criteria: stg_events resolves correctly to staging model

title: Implement basic DAG builder in graph/
description: Build dependency graph from parsed refs.

title: Implement AST-based fingerprinting
description: Create stable hash from normalized AST + config (ignore whitespace).

title: Create state/store.go with SQLite
description: Set up embedded SQLite for environments and model states.
acceptance_criteria: CRUD methods for Environment and ModelState

title: Implement state/manager.go
description: High-level GetOrCreateEnv and SaveModelState.

title: Implement virtual/env.go
description: Basic virtual environment orchestration.

title: Add ClickHouse zero-copy clone helpers
description: Implement ClickHouseZeroCopyClone and VirtualView functions.
acceptance_criteria: Correct DDL generated for CLONE and VIEW

title: Wire virtual/manager.go with ClickHouse runner stub
description: Connect virtual manager to runner interface.

title: Create ClickHouse runner stub
description: Basic Exec method for ClickHouse using database/sql + clickhouse driver.

title: Implement plan engine core logic
description: Compare fingerprints and build execution plan list.
acceptance_criteria: Plan struct with ChangedModels and Impact

title: Add impact analysis to plan
description: Detect downstream affected models using DAG.

title: Implement apply execution logic
description: Execute plan steps (clone, view refresh, incremental run).

title: Add progress reporting and cost estimation to apply
description: Show [1/9] style output and basic ClickHouse cost estimate.

title: Create full agentic_retail_2026 example structure
description: Create directories and placeholder files.

title: Update agentic_retail_2026 example models to fully clean SQL (remove any {{ ref() }})
description: Rewrite all example models using direct table names.
acceptance_criteria: All models use clean SQL table references

title: Write customer_360.sql (agentic core model)
description: Include behavioral features and @ tags.

title: Write daily_metrics.sql and ab_test_results.sql
description: Add the remaining marts models.

title: Create sqlforge.yml and sources.yml for example
description: Basic config and sources definition.

title: Implement env create CLI command
description: Wire cobra command for env create with flags.

title: Implement plan CLI command
description: With --detailed flag and nice output.
acceptance_criteria: sqlforge plan shows changes and impact

title: Implement apply CLI command
description: With --yes, --dry-run, parallel support.

title: Add run, parse, transpile CLI commands
description: Basic wiring.

title: Implement light AI client (Ollama first)
description: Simple HTTP client for explain/suggest.
acceptance_criteria: sqlforge ai explain works with context

title: Create ARCHITECTURE.md and ROADMAP.md
description: Document Level 2 + stretch targets.
acceptance_criteria: Docs are comprehensive and include Mermaid where useful

title: Add basic tests for parser and fingerprint
description: Unit tests for core logic.
acceptance_criteria: go test ./... passes for parser and graph
